chunks.title: David's Plea for Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist introduces his situation and asks God to save him from his pursuers.

chunks.title: Call for Divine Judgment
chunks.reason: David urges God to arise in anger and judge the peoples according to his integrity.

chunks.title: The Wicked's Retribution
chunks.reason: A description of God's weapons and the inevitable consequence for those who scheme against the righteous.

chunks.title: Song of Praise
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with a vow to thank God for His righteousness.
